human_readable_name: De-NATRM final release model (causal + 18 primary ROI + 7 composite ROI + 6 PET shape ROI)
release_selection_note: This is the final De-NATRM export target selected for the public repository and manuscript-linked release. It uses a precision-recall-targeted threshold configuration with target recall 0.90.
regimen_label_note: The frozen model predicts abstract NAT scheme classes Standard and De-escalation. It does not directly output concrete regimen labels such as TCbHP, THP, or HP.
